authenticity.title: Authenticity

experience.title: Experience

aftercare.title: Tattoo Aftercare Guide
aftercare.subtitle: How to care for your fresh tattoo for perfect results
aftercare.intro: Proper tattoo care in the first weeks is essential for a perfect result. Follow this step-by-step guide.

first24h.title: First 24 hours
steps: Keep the bandage applied by the artist for 2-4 hours.
Wash the tattoo with lukewarm water and fragrance-free antibacterial soap.
Gently pat dry with a clean towel (don't rub).
Apply a thin layer of recommended healing cream.
Don't cover the tattoo with a bandage after the first wash.

firstWeek.title: First week
steps: Wash the tattoo 2-3 times a day with antibacterial soap.
Apply healing cream after each wash.
Don't scratch or pick at the scabs that form.
Wear loose clothing over the tattooed area.
Avoid water from pools, the sea, or bathtubs.

firstMonth.title: First month
steps: Continue moisturizing the area with fragrance-free cream.
Protect the tattoo from direct sun exposure.
Avoid intense activities that cause excessive sweating.
Don't expose the tattoo to natural or artificial tanning.
If you notice signs of infection, contact a doctor.

dos.title: Do's
items: Wash your hands before touching the tattoo.
Protect it from the sun with SPF 50+ after healing.
Drink plenty of water for hydration.

donts.title: Don'ts
items: Don't scratch or pick at scabs.
Don't soak the tattoo in water (bathtub, pool, sea).
Don't apply alcohol, peroxide, or betadine.
Don't expose the tattoo to direct sunlight.
Don't wear tight clothing over the tattoo.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about tattoos

items.question: How long does a tattoo session last?
items.answer: Duration varies depending on the complexity and size of the tattoo. A session can last from 1 hour for a small tattoo, up to 6-8 hours for larger projects. During the consultation, the artist will give you a more accurate estimate.

items.question: How much does a tattoo cost?
items.answer: The price varies depending on size, complexity, details, and time required. Book a free consultation and let's discuss your project — we'll give you a personalized estimate.

items.question: Does getting a tattoo hurt?
items.answer: The level of discomfort varies depending on the body area and individual pain tolerance. The most sensitive areas are the ribs, spine, and inner arm. Your artist will guide you to make the experience as comfortable as possible.

items.question: What should I do before my session?
items.answer: Make sure you're well-rested, hydrated, and have eaten before your session. Avoid alcohol and aspirin 24 hours before. Wear comfortable clothes that allow access to the area being tattooed.

items.question: Can I come without an appointment?
items.answer: We work by appointment only to give each client the attention they deserve. Book a consultation online, and we'll contact you within 24 hours.

items.question: What tattoo styles do you do?
items.answer: Madalina specializes in realism, portraits, color, and black & grey. Florentin specializes in graphic design, line work, geometric, and minimalism. Between us, we cover a wide range of styles.

items.question: Do you accept custom projects?
items.answer: Absolutely! Every tattoo we create is unique and personalized. During the consultation, we discuss your idea and create a custom design that matches your vision.

items.question: How do I care for my tattoo after the session?
items.answer: We have a complete aftercare guide on our website. Additionally, at the end of your session, your artist will give you detailed and personalized instructions for caring for your tattoo.
